steps.title: Connect past to present
steps.content: The text moves from the 1908 discovery of Pasiphae to the current total of known Jovian moons. The transition must indicate accumulation up to now.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: B would restate the previous sentence. C would make the current total merely an example. D would introduce a correction or contrast. A present-time transition best fits the move from 1908 to now. The answer is A.
